finding_results.evidence: The chapter now stages Mohit's coercive pitch in real time, ties June's future to disengaging from the grievance, and shows the pressure landing physically on her body before the stairwell fallout clarifies the offer: chapters/chapter_14.md:196; chapters/chapter_14.md:200; chapters/chapter_14.md:204; chapters/chapter_14.md:212; chapters/chapter_14.md:218; chapters/chapter_14.md:238
finding_results.notes: Replaced post-meeting paraphrase with an overheard office-door exchange in Leela's close-third frame, then kept June's aftermath scene focused on the strategic cost of the offer rather than carrying the whole coercive beat by summary.

summary: Rendered Mohit's pressure campaign against June on-page, made the Brooklyn introduction explicitly contingent on her stepping back from the grievance, and gave June an immediate bodily consequence so the coalition break lands as scene rather than sanitized recap.
